title: Thelypteris densa
taxonomy: Thelypteris densa is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Thelypteris and is a part of the Thelypteridaceae family. The species is a type of deciduous or semi-evergreen fern that is native to North America. Thelypteris densa is also known as the dense lady fern or dense maiden fern. Its classification is further categorized under the class Polypodiopsida, division Pteridophyta, and kingdom Plantae.

This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory issues.
